prompt:
Generate a high-resolution vertical 3D character poster blending Pixar styling with designer-toy sensibility.

Subject:
SPIRITUAL WORLD KEYWORD — rendered as a tall, lean, mildly exaggerated Pixar-style 3D figure.
Keep the celebrity's signature face, hair, posture, and wardrobe intact, but translate them into clean, simplified, blocky designer-toy proportions.
The figure must stay instantly recognizable, shown full-body, in a pose that conveys their personality, aura, or public persona.

Pose:
A natural yet expressive stance, with a touch of theatricality where it suits the celebrity.
Head tilt, hand gesture, and overall posture should together broadcast who this person is.

Background:
For every generation, pick one vivid, bold, highly saturated solid color matching the celebrity's temperament and the emotional register of their spiritual world.
Acceptable directions: hot red, saturated yellow, blood orange, cobalt blue, vivid green, electric purple, deep cyan, and similar.
The backdrop should read flat, clean, graphic, and bold, like a gallery poster or a conceptual exhibition print.
No gradients, no muted tones, no dull cinematic gray.
The floor can take a related hue, slightly darker or lighter than the wall, with a faint reflective sheen.
Keep the environment minimal, infinite, and free of clutter.

Lighting:
One strong directional source, coming from a side angle or from above.
It must cast a sharp, oversized shadow on the wall behind the figure.
The lighting needs to feel graphic, dramatic, and deliberate, spotlighting both the character and the symbolic shadow.

Core idea, shadow as spiritual projection:
The shadow behind the figure must NOT mirror the actual body silhouette.
Instead it becomes a symbolic projection of the celebrity's inner world, legacy, psychological core, or most iconic creative or spiritual motif.
It should be large, dominant, visually arresting, and blend organically across wall and floor.
It should look as if the celebrity's invisible inner life has been projected outward into a visible form.
The shadow must visually embody the supplied spiritual-world keyword:
SPIRITUAL WORLD KEYWORD

This symbolic shadow can take an abstract, surreal, poetic, metaphorical, or object-based form, whatever best captures the celebrity's essence.
It must function as more than decoration: it is the true conceptual heart of the poster.

Typography:
Use the spiritual-world keyword, NOT the celebrity's name, as the main poster headline.
Render:
SPIRITUAL WORLD KEYWORD

Pick a clean minimalist typeface, sans-serif or serif depending on mood.
Place it in a balanced corner slot, usually top-left, with elegant hierarchy and strong poster layout.
The celebrity's name may appear smaller in a secondary position if needed, but the keyword must always be the dominant title.

Rendering:
Pixar-grade 3D rendering
